entries.reason: The agent produced 20 persisted model responses, then its container exited before trajectory, prediction, or evaluator scorecard generation. The frozen protocol permits retries only when no model response was produced.

The agent produced 25 persisted model responses and a patch that applied successfully. The evaluator then failed during its internal git restore step because test/rules/std_L060_test.py was not tracked in the evaluation checkout, leaving no test-result terminal status. The frozen protocol forbids a retry after model responses were produced.
